title: Intensely Roasted Jamaican Chicken Wrap
description: A roasted, snappy, and comforting Jamaican dish featuring San Marzano tomatoes, served in a donabe with ssam wraps, high in protein and flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together chicken, San Marzano tomatoes, scotch bonnet peppers, and jamaican jerk seasoning.
Transfer the mixture to the donabe and drizzle with olive oil.
Roast the chicken mixture in the oven for 30 minutes.
While the chicken is roasting, warm the ssam wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
Once the chicken is done, assemble the wraps by spooning the chicken mixture onto a ssam wrap and serving immediately.
Repeat the assembly process for the remaining ingredients.
Serve the wraps hot and enjoy.
Garnish with fresh cilantro or scallions if desired.
Cook poultry to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F before serving.
